channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: Crockwrights of Eriador
item.description: Crafting recipes for many ceramic pieces

item.title: Mini's Assorted Patches
item.description: Buncha changes for a LAN

item.title: One Hour, One Life
item.description: Made for the server "Humankind". This mod aims to recreate features from "One Hour, One life"

item.title: TAROT CARDS
item.description: Adds a pickable tarot card on character creation

item.title: TinkerTailor - Backpacks
item.description: More backpacks & pouches for the veteran seraph. Made with love & pain, No AI.

item.title: Limestone Scanner
item.description: Scans for Stones that can be grinded into Lime within 100 Blocks radius

item.title: More animations
item.description: Better body and face animations

item.title: Vintage Story Chinese Language Pack
item.description: Vintage Story Chinese Language Pack（复古物语模组汉化包）

item.title: Genelib
item.description: A library for other mods to calculate genetic inheritance

item.title: Dragonia Server Mod Patch
item.description: Меняет генерацию железа и добавляет новый крафт льняного шпагата

item.title: Dragonia Translations
item.description: Переводы и отредактированные переводы под стиль сервера.

item.title: socks_rmtweak
item.description: tweak to rustmagic that simplifies crafting

item.title: Hardtack Bread
item.description: Dry, salty, very long-lasting bread. Needs to be softened to eat. Includes two historical dishes.

item.title: SheyderMod
item.description: A simple SheyderMod that supports the original artstyle of the game.

item.title: Alchemy
item.description: Potion mod that adds buffs to the player.

item.title: Firearms Patch
item.description: Changes the musket to deal equivalent damage to the Windlass with steel bolts.

item.title: IRDP's Wet Crops Mod
item.description: Adding a few new moisture-heavy crops to the game. Compat with Paddy Fields.

item.title: Galeret
item.description: A race of cat people based on kahjit

item.title: Optimum
item.description: High-performance client fork. Compile-time patches, no Harmony. Same gameplay, faster frames

item.title: Double Beds
item.description: Allows combining 2 beds of the same type in the crafting grid to obtain a double bed.

item.title: Table Expansion
item.description: Allows combining several identical tables in the crafting grid to build larger ones.

item.title: VSCN Language Pack Updater
item.description: VSCN Language Pack Updater（汉化模组的更新器）

item.title: Equus: Medieval Horses
item.description: Adds a medieval warhorse to the game that can be purchased from a new horse trader

item.title: All The Stats
item.description: A dual-purpose library for players and mod creators interested in new stats for traits and recipes.

item.title: Alternative armor designs
item.description: With this mod, you can make use of all vanilla armor designs for each respective armor pieces.

item.title: The Art Hoard
item.description: Adds new paintigns to the game, some craftable, others sold by merchants.

item.title: Achievements
item.description: Adds vanilla, lore, AllClasses, Hod and Primitive Survival Achievements and random rewards

item.title: Extreme Weathers [ALPHA]
item.description: Greatly increases the threat the elements pose, blizzards, hurricanes, monsoons. Get ready!

item.title: Downed
item.description: Replaces the vanilla downed state with a survivable, invulnerable downed state. Quite bloody.

item.title: ecomachina x wildcraft
item.description: makes most trees from wildcrafttrees work with ecomachina
